    knowledgevba v2.3.2 インストーラ (コピペ式・2 段)¶

    このページのコードを そのままコピーしてローカルで実行 するインストーラです。 ネットからの自動ダウンロードは一切行いません (コピペした内容だけがローカルで動きます)。

    作業を 2 段 に分けています。STEP1 が成功して STEP2 で失敗した場合は 「ファイル生成は OK / 取り込み段で失敗」と切り分けられます。

    段 スクリプト 何をするか
    STEP 1/2 kvba_1_files.ps1 VBA モジュール・ソース・ui_seed を展開し、blank の 管理.xlsm / 検索.xlsm を生成 (Excel への取り込みはしない)
    STEP 2/2 kvba_2_import.ps1 STEP1 が置いたモジュールを 管理.xlsm / 検索.xlsm へ Import し Setup を実行

    書き込み先はユーザ領域 (C:\KnowledgeMgr\dist と C:\KnowledgeMgr\) のみです。 開発ツリーへの書き込みは guardrail が拒否します。

    事前に 1 度だけ必要な Excel 設定¶

    Excel → ファイル → オプション → トラスト センター → トラスト センターの設定 → マクロの設定 → 「VBA プロジェクト オブジェクト モデルへのアクセスを信頼する」 にチェック。

    共通の注意¶

    • どちらのスクリプトも コードブロックを「すべて」コピー してください。 先頭から末尾の # === KVBA_EOF_V23 === までが揃っていないと、 スクリプトは自己検査で 何も書き込まずに終了 します (コピペ切断の保険)。
    • 文字コードは どれでも可 です (本スクリプトは全文 ASCII のため文字化け事故が起きません)。
    • STEP1 の各ファイルは sha256 照合つき で展開されます。

    STEP 1/2 — ファイル / モジュール生成¶

    1. 下の STEP1 コードブロックを 全文コピー し、メモ帳に貼り付け kvba_1_files.ps1 という名前で保存。
    2. PowerShell から実行: 
      powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File kvba_1_files.ps1
    3. 画面に STEP 1/2 complete: files generated. と出れば成功です。 C:\KnowledgeMgr\dist\ に 管理.xlsm / 検索.xlsm と installer フォルダが置かれます。

    ダブルクリックで実行したい場合は、同じフォルダに次を kvba_1_files.bat として保存: 

    @echo off
powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "%~dp0kvba_1_files.ps1"
pause

    STEP1 ファイル全文¶

    下のコードを すべて コピーしてください (1.5 MB / sha256 eea09c7018584e5c35c63b947c4705fa326b7bf4778e8d3c49d20dcbe40dfa7a / generated 2026-06-27 01:36)。

    # ============================================================
# knowledgevba v2.3.2 installer STEP 1/2 : file & module generation
# (generated file - DO NOT EDIT)
# built: 2026-06-27 01:36:26  by build_knowledgevba_install.py
# payloads: 78  manifest-sha256: f3fa4d9f94ef7f715e5c6fd3d8c4c01e86ad6866f26be7758b02a5a357e44129
# This file is pure ASCII. Japanese paths are base64(UTF-8)-encoded.
# Run STEP 1 first, then run kvba_2_import.ps1 (STEP 2/2).
# ============================================================
[CmdletBinding()]
param(
    # [USER-REQ 2026-06-12] fixed absolute install path (no per-user profile path)
    [string]$InstallDir = 'C:\KnowledgeMgr\dist'
)
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'

# ---- self integrity check (detects copy-paste truncation) ----
$self = $MyInvocation.MyCommand.Definition
$selfLines = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllLines($self)
$lastLine = ($selfLines | Where-Object { $_.Trim() -ne '' } | Select-Object -Last 1)
if ($lastLine -ne '# === KVBA_EOF_V23 ===') {
    Write-Host '[FATAL] this script is truncated (EOF marker missing).' -ForegroundColor Red
    Write-Host '        Re-copy the FULL code block and retry.' -ForegroundColor Red
    exit 9
}

function DecodeName([string]$b64) {
    return [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String($b64))
}

$LogPath = $null
function Log([string]$m) {
    $line = ('[{0}] {1}' -f (Get-Date -Format 'HH:mm:ss'), $m)
    if ($LogPath) { Add-Content -LiteralPath $LogPath -Value $line -Encoding UTF8 }
    Write-Host $line
}

# ---- guardrail (review Q8): only act inside $InstallDir, never into dev trees ----
$InstallDir = [System.IO.Path]::GetFullPath($InstallDir)
$denyRoots = @('C:\kvba\publish', 'C:\kvba\uat', 'C:\decisions')
foreach ($d in $denyRoots) {
    if ($InstallDir.TrimEnd('\').ToLowerInvariant().StartsWith($d.ToLowerInvariant())) {
        Write-Host ('[FATAL] InstallDir points into a protected dev tree: ' + $InstallDir) -ForegroundColor Red
        exit 8
    }
}
function Assert-SafePath([string]$p) {
    $full = [System.IO.Path]::GetFullPath($p)
    if (-not $full.ToLowerInvariant().StartsWith($InstallDir.ToLowerInvariant())) {
        throw ('guardrail violation: write outside InstallDir: ' + $full)
    }
    foreach ($d in $script:denyRoots) {
        if ($full.ToLowerInvariant().StartsWith($d.ToLowerInvariant())) {
            throw ('guardrail violation: write into protected dev tree: ' + $full)
        }
    }
    return $full
}

$sha256 = [System.Security.Cryptography.SHA256]::Create()
function Write-Payload([string]$relB64, [string]$expectedSha, [string]$b64) {
    $rel = DecodeName $relB64
    $bytes = [Convert]::FromBase64String($b64)
    $actual = ([System.BitConverter]::ToString($sha256.ComputeHash($bytes)) -replace '-', '').ToLowerInvariant()
    if ($actual -ne $expectedSha) {
        throw ('payload corrupted (sha256 mismatch): ' + $rel)
    }
    $full = Assert-SafePath (Join-Path $InstallDir $rel)
    $dir = Split-Path -Parent $full
    if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $dir)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dir | Out-Null }
    [System.IO.File]::WriteAllBytes($full, $bytes)
}

New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $InstallDir | Out-Null
$LogPath = Join-Path $InstallDir 'install_step1_files.log'
'' | Set-Content -LiteralPath $LogPath -Encoding UTF8
Log ('=== knowledgevba v2.3.2 STEP 1/2 (file generation) start (InstallDir=' + $InstallDir + ') ===')

# ---- STEP 1a: write payloads (modules / source / installer bats / ui_seed) ----
Log 'STEP 1a: write payloads (modules + source + ui_seed)'
Write-Payload 'aW5zdGFsbGVyL19hdXRvX2luc3RhbGwucHMx' '3bd5454fd2cd96bdae22224819be700bbf8eb61849bc2c260b9186ff1eac597a' @'
77u/W0NtZGxldEJpbmRpbmcoKV0NCnBhcmFtKA0KICAgIFtQYXJhbWV0ZXIoTWFuZGF0b3J5ID0g

ltqIwFxuSU5GTyCBYyCSyo/tiV6XcILFjmeCpJVXj4CDgoFbg2iBQo+Il52CzJDfltqCxoNHg4mB
W4FFjHiNkILwi0yYXlxuREVCVUcggWMgkXqS6ILGiOGCpILGirSCtoK9jp6XcIFCj4iXnZS7kuiC
zI/agrWCopesguqC3ILFi0yYXlxuVFJBQ0UggWMgREVCVUcggsWC4Iy0iPaCqpLNgt+CyIKijp6X

'@
Log ('[OK] 78 payloads written + sha256 verified')

# ---- STEP 1b: KnowledgeMgr runtime dirs ----
# Fix-6 (ADR-0133): per-role text-file config (*_config.txt) retired.
# debugLevel / paths / logRotationRows / uiSchemaFailMode are now the 9-cell
# worksheet SSOT (M-10), seeded by Setup at first run. No config.txt is written.
Log 'STEP 1b: KnowledgeMgr runtime dirs'
$KM = 'C:\KnowledgeMgr'
foreach ($d in @('', 'data', 'formats', 'ui', 'backup', 'log', 'config')) {
    $p = Join-Path $KM $d
    if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $p)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $p | Out-Null }
}
Log '[OK] runtime dirs ready (config.txt seeding removed - worksheet SSOT)'

# ---- STEP 1c: blank macro-enabled workbooks via Excel COM ----
# NOTE: hand-crafted zip shells are FORBIDDEN - Excel refuses to run macros in them.
Log 'STEP 1c: create blank xlsm via Excel COM'
Get-Process -Name EXCEL -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
Start-Sleep -Seconds 2
$excel = New-Object -ComObject Excel.Application
$excel.Visible = $false
$excel.DisplayAlerts = $false
try {
    foreach ($roleB64 in @('566h55CG', '5qSc57Si')) {
        $jp = DecodeName $roleB64
        $xlsm = Assert-SafePath (Join-Path $InstallDir ($jp + '.xlsm'))
        if (Test-Path -LiteralPath $xlsm) { Remove-Item -LiteralPath $xlsm -Force }
        $wb = $excel.Workbooks.Add()
        $wb.SaveAs($xlsm, 52)
        $wb.Close($false)
        Log ('[OK] blank xlsm created: ' + $xlsm)
    }
} finally {
    try { $excel.Quit() } catch {}
    [System.Runtime.InteropServices.Marshal]::ReleaseComObject($excel) | Out-Null
    [GC]::Collect(); [GC]::WaitForPendingFinalizers()
}

Log '=== STEP 1/2 DONE: files generated (modules + source + blank xlsm). ==='
Log ('    next: run kvba_2_import.ps1 to import modules into the workbooks.')
Write-Host ''
Write-Host '======================================================' -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host ' STEP 1/2 complete: files generated.' -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host ' Now run STEP 2/2  ->  kvba_2_import.ps1' -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host '======================================================' -ForegroundColor Green
exit 0
# === KVBA_EOF_V23 ===

    STEP 2/2 — モジュール取り込み + セットアップ¶

    先に STEP 1/2 を実行しておいてください。未実行だと STEP2 は 「STEP 1 outputs are missing」と表示して安全に停止します。

    1. 下の STEP2 コードブロックを 全文コピー し、メモ帳に貼り付け kvba_2_import.ps1 という名前で保存。
    2. 開いている Excel はすべて閉じてから、PowerShell で実行: 
      powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File kvba_2_import.ps1
    3. 画面に STEP 2/2 complete: install + setup succeeded. と出れば完了です。 C:\KnowledgeMgr\dist\管理.xlsm / 検索.xlsm を開いて動作を確認してください。

    ダブルクリックで実行したい場合は kvba_2_import.bat: 

    @echo off
powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "%~dp0kvba_2_import.ps1"
pause

    STEP2 ファイル全文¶

    下のコードを すべて コピーしてください (7 KB / sha256 07d24aa64b34db0267e1efc2014b1a1ae160f5236d30042f5329302bf14fe539 / generated 2026-06-27 01:36)。

    # ============================================================
# knowledgevba v2.3.2 installer STEP 2/2 : module import + setup
# (generated file - DO NOT EDIT)
# built: 2026-06-27 01:36:26  by build_knowledgevba_install.py
# This file is pure ASCII. Japanese paths are base64(UTF-8)-encoded.
# PRECONDITION: run kvba_1_files.ps1 (STEP 1/2) first.
# ============================================================
[CmdletBinding()]
param(
    # [USER-REQ 2026-06-12] fixed absolute install path (no per-user profile path)
    [string]$InstallDir = 'C:\KnowledgeMgr\dist'
)
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'

# ---- self integrity check (detects copy-paste truncation) ----
$self = $MyInvocation.MyCommand.Definition
$selfLines = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllLines($self)
$lastLine = ($selfLines | Where-Object { $_.Trim() -ne '' } | Select-Object -Last 1)
if ($lastLine -ne '# === KVBA_EOF_V23 ===') {
    Write-Host '[FATAL] this script is truncated (EOF marker missing).' -ForegroundColor Red
    Write-Host '        Re-copy the FULL code block and retry.' -ForegroundColor Red
    exit 9
}

function DecodeName([string]$b64) {
    return [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String($b64))
}

$LogPath = $null
function Log([string]$m) {
    $line = ('[{0}] {1}' -f (Get-Date -Format 'HH:mm:ss'), $m)
    if ($LogPath) { Add-Content -LiteralPath $LogPath -Value $line -Encoding UTF8 }
    Write-Host $line
}

# ---- guardrail (review Q8): only act inside $InstallDir, never into dev trees ----
$InstallDir = [System.IO.Path]::GetFullPath($InstallDir)
$denyRoots = @('C:\kvba\publish', 'C:\kvba\uat', 'C:\decisions')
foreach ($d in $denyRoots) {
    if ($InstallDir.TrimEnd('\').ToLowerInvariant().StartsWith($d.ToLowerInvariant())) {
        Write-Host ('[FATAL] InstallDir points into a protected dev tree: ' + $InstallDir) -ForegroundColor Red
        exit 8
    }
}
function Assert-SafePath([string]$p) {
    $full = [System.IO.Path]::GetFullPath($p)
    if (-not $full.ToLowerInvariant().StartsWith($InstallDir.ToLowerInvariant())) {
        throw ('guardrail violation: write outside InstallDir: ' + $full)
    }
    foreach ($d in $script:denyRoots) {
        if ($full.ToLowerInvariant().StartsWith($d.ToLowerInvariant())) {
            throw ('guardrail violation: write into protected dev tree: ' + $full)
        }
    }
    return $full
}

$LogPath = Join-Path $InstallDir 'install_step2_import.log'
if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $InstallDir)) {
    Write-Host ('[FATAL] InstallDir not found: ' + $InstallDir) -ForegroundColor Red
    Write-Host '        Run STEP 1/2 (kvba_1_files.ps1) first.' -ForegroundColor Red
    exit 7
}
'' | Set-Content -LiteralPath $LogPath -Encoding UTF8
Log ('=== knowledgevba v2.3.2 STEP 2/2 (module import) start (InstallDir=' + $InstallDir + ') ===')

# ---- precheck: verify STEP 1 outputs exist ----
Log 'precheck: verifying STEP 1 outputs'
$need = @(
    (Join-Path $InstallDir 'installer\install_admin.bat'),
    (Join-Path $InstallDir 'installer\install_search.bat'),
    (Join-Path $InstallDir 'installer\_auto_install.ps1'),
    (Join-Path $InstallDir 'installer\vba_modules\common'),
    (Join-Path $InstallDir 'installer\vba_modules\admin'),
    (Join-Path $InstallDir 'installer\vba_modules\search'),
    (Join-Path $InstallDir ((DecodeName '566h55CG') + '.xlsm')),
    (Join-Path $InstallDir ((DecodeName '5qSc57Si') + '.xlsm'))
)
$missing = @()
foreach ($n in $need) { if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $n)) { $missing += $n } }
if ($missing.Count -gt 0) {
    Log '[FATAL] STEP 1 outputs are missing:'
    foreach ($m in $missing) { Log ('   missing: ' + $m) }
    Log '       => run kvba_1_files.ps1 (STEP 1/2) first, then re-run this script.'
    exit 6
}
Log '[OK] STEP 1 outputs present.'

# ---- import + setup (admin, then search) ----
# v2.3.2 fix (line-95 crash): call _auto_install.ps1 DIRECTLY in PowerShell
# instead of shelling through the CP932 install_*.bat via cmd.exe.
#   root cause 1: on UTF-8 systems (console codepage 65001 - Win11 "Beta: Unicode
#     UTF-8" mode) cmd.exe misreads the CP932 batch; multibyte trail bytes break
#     the (...) blocks and cmd tries to run Japanese fragments as commands -> stderr.
#   root cause 2: `... 2>&1` under $ErrorActionPreference='Stop' promoted that first
#     stderr line to a terminating NativeCommandError, reported at the call operator
#     (the "line 95 char 5" abort).
# PowerShell passes the Japanese .xlsm path as a native Unicode string, so there is
# no codepage dependency at all. EAP is relaxed around the native call so a stray
# stderr line is captured into the log, never thrown.
Log 'import: _auto_install.ps1 (admin, then search)'
$KM = 'C:\KnowledgeMgr'
$autoPs1 = Join-Path $InstallDir 'installer\_auto_install.ps1'
$roleXlsm = @{ 'admin' = (DecodeName '566h55CG'); 'search' = (DecodeName '5qSc57Si') }
$rcTotal = 0
foreach ($role in @('admin', 'search')) {
    $xlsm = Join-Path $InstallDir ($roleXlsm[$role] + '.xlsm')
    Log ('[..] install ' + $role + ' -> ' + $xlsm)
    Get-Process -Name EXCEL -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
    Start-Sleep -Seconds 2
    $prevEAP = $ErrorActionPreference
    $ErrorActionPreference = 'Continue'
    & powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File $autoPs1 -XlsmPath $xlsm -Role $role 2>&1 | ForEach-Object { Add-Content -LiteralPath $LogPath -Value ([string]$_); Write-Host $_ }
    $rc = $LASTEXITCODE
    $ErrorActionPreference = $prevEAP
    Log ('[..] install_' + $role + ' rc=' + $rc)
    if ($rc -ne 0) { $rcTotal = 1 }
    Get-Process -Name EXCEL -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
    Start-Sleep -Seconds 2
}

if ($rcTotal -eq 0) {
    Log '=== ALL DONE: STEP 2/2 import + setup succeeded ==='
    Log ('open these files in Excel: ' + (Join-Path $InstallDir (DecodeName '566h55CG')) + '.xlsm / ' + (Join-Path $InstallDir (DecodeName '5qSc57Si')) + '.xlsm')
    Write-Host ''
    Write-Host '======================================================' -ForegroundColor Green
    Write-Host ' STEP 2/2 complete: install + setup succeeded.' -ForegroundColor Green
    Write-Host '======================================================' -ForegroundColor Green
    exit 0
} else {
    Log '=== FAILED at STEP 2/2 (import/setup). STEP 1 files are intact; see log above. ==='
    exit 1
}
# === KVBA_EOF_V23 ===
    ␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀
